productDisplayName: Puma Men Bolt Lite Black Shoes
description: A great addition to your wardrobe, these Bolt Lite Mid ankle length shoes from puma come in a luxuriously light weight and offer a great Fit and comfort. Team these with jeans and tees for those casual occasions when you want to look your best. Upper Premium mesh uppers for comfort and durability Lightly padded tongue and collar for comfort Stitch overlays to further add to the structure Synthetic formstripe detail Central lace ups for a snug and customised fit Midsole Synthetic lining with a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Phylon midsole for light weight comfort Outsole Phylon outsole in waffle pattern for cushioning and grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
